sentence: Sorry, I didn't mean to spook you. Captain wanted me to bring these guys some grub... you know your book's upside down.
Thought I'd check in on you guys and bring you some food. How are you feeling, by the way?
Why are we being held captive? We had nothing to do with Minkowski's death.
This has nothing to do with Minkowski. The captain wasn't very happy that you two decided to bust out of sick bay and into our radio room.
We didn't bust out. The door was left open! We assumed that was you.
Why the hell would I do that?
Did you have any contact with our people on the beach?
No luck. Something must have happened to the phone.
Sorry, we had a little problem in the kitchen. Just stay put, alright?
I still want to talk to the captain.
사이드하고 데스몬드가 떠난지 3일이나 지났는데 왜 아직 돌아오지 않는 걸까요?
아마 배를 타고 오느라 시간이 좀 걸리나봐.
자, 그 얘기 그만하고 더 중요한 게 하나 있어.
Good. You're getting better... But no, Jin. 지금부터 아기 이름을 지으면 못 나가요.
이 녀석한테 나쁜 일이 생기면 안 되지.
아니, 이름은 예뻐요. 우리 이렇게 해요. 우선 이 섬에서 벗어난 다음에 그때 가서 아기 이름을 지어요.
저 임신부인데요. 뭐가 잘못된 것 같아요.
어서 오세요! 뭐 찾으시는 거 있으세요?
아니요, 시간이 없어요. 병원에 가는 길이예요. 얼만데요?
아이, 진작 말씀해 주시지! 참 기쁘시겠네요. 혹시 아드님인지 따님인지 아시나요?
팬더는 누구든 다 좋아하니까 걱정 마세요.
네, 네... 지금 가는 길입니다. 예, 알겠습니다. 네, 간다니까요.
You mean before or after the redhead knocked me out?
When I ran into them on my way back from Locke's camp.
I guess she didn't wanna have to explain why she was on her way to a poison gas factory. Juliet told Jack that it was a power station.
Why would Juliet lie about that?
To turn it off, to deactivate the gas. I guess they wanted to earn some brownie points.
Do you think they're really going to rescue us?
In all the time they've been here they've talked about a lot of things, and none involved rescuing us.
I hope they resolve their kitchen issues.
It's a note. Three days ago, when I was in Locke's camp, Ben claimed he had a spy on this boat.
Hi, Sun, hi... I'm Daniel. Something I can help you with?
So are you here to rescue us?
It's a simple question. Are you or are you not going to rescue us?
The thing is... um, it's not really my call, Sun.
Uh, can you pass, uh, the cereal?
Thank you. I... understand better than I, uh, speak.
Has Sun been teaching you, or are you just picking it up?
Uh, Sun teach me... Uh, Sawyer, too. Sun, is... better.
Hey Sun. How are you feeling?
I'm good, thank you... The morning sickness has stopped, which has been nice.
That's good... Well, if you need anything, just let me know, okay?
진수 씨, 지금부터 이유는 묻지 말고 내가 시키는 대로만 해야 해요.
이틀 동안 우리 먹을 식량을 챙겨서 20분 후에 우리 텐트에서 봐요.
뭐 때문에 그러는데? 무슨 일이 생겼어?
I needed another bottle of those vitamins you gave me, the... the pre-natals?
What happened to the last ones I gave you?
The last bottle I gave you. There should be 20 left... are you planning a trip?
Please, just give me the vitamins.
Because I don't trust these people.
Whether you trust them or not, you can't go there. Locke doesn't want to leave the island, and I've told you... Sun, pregnant women... they don't survive here.
Yes, you did tell me that.

You don't believe me... Look, I know that I have been less than truthful about certain things since coming here, but I promise you, Sun... I promise you, I'm not lying about this. After everything you've confided in me, I should at least have your trust.
Claire's baby is fine. I feel fine. All I have are your stories that I'm going to get sick. I'm going to do what's best for me and for my baby, because, no... I don't trust you.
귀금속 빼셔야 합니다. 혈압이 높아서 몸이 많이 부었어요.
아냐아냐, 그냥 둬. 백선화 씨, 전 닥터 박 대신 담당을 맡은 닥터 배입니다.
박 선생님은요? 저 왜 이러는 거예요?
박 선생님은 지금 출장 중입니다. 제가 우선 진통제를 놔드리겠습니다.
제 애기한테 무슨 이상이 있는 건가요?
아직은 잘 모르겠지만 알아보겠습니다. 연락드릴 가족분 계십니까? 남편분이나 부모님?
제 남편한테 연락을... 제 남편 좀 불러주세요.
진수 씨? 진수 씨 좀 불러주세요.
이놈의 새끼, 너! 너 이 새끼야! 너 오늘 죽었어, 너 나한테 잡히기만 해봐! 나한테 보이기만 해봐!
어떡하죠, 손님. 그 인형이 마지막 거였는데요.
저거는 벌써 팔린 거예요. 사신 게 워낙 잘 팔리는 물건이 돼서요.
손님, 이거는 어때요? 올해가 용띠 아니예요? 행운을 갖고 올 거 같은데.
그냥 그 팬더 이리 갖고 와요.
Once you hit the stream, you want to head northwest, pretty much in a straight line for about a day and a half.
I'm gonna have to tell Jack. But I'll give you guys a nice, long headstart.
I'd tell him myself, but he wouldn't understand.
You'd better get going. Be safe okay?
She's not going anywhere. Sun, this is a bad idea.
What concern is it of yours?
Do you understand your wife's medical condition right now? Translate for me.
Your wife is very sick. If she doesn't get off this island in three weeks, she will die.
If you let her go, your wife is in danger. Jin... Danger.
Jin. Your wife had an affair.
Sun was with another man. She thought the baby was his.
진수씨, 진수씨... 나랑 얘기 좀 해요. 내가 다 설명할게. 그건 오래 전 일이었어요. 나 좀 봐봐. 나 좀 봐봐. 나 다신 이러는 거 이해해. 입이 열 개라도 나 할말이 없어. 그래도 나한테 설명할 기회를 좀 줘요.
나한테 설명할 기회를 좀 줘요. 진수 씨...
Uh, you mind if I... tag along?
Oh... Oh, I am sorry. I—I didn't mean to interrupt.
You realize we're the only two married guys on the island?

Yeah, well, no, not to each other. No. You got it. It's not easy, is it? Oh, I mean, it's—it's wonderful, but... let's face it, every decision that you make takes twice as long. 'Cause you always gotta talk them into it. Rose... has cancer. She's sick. Dying. Well, at least, she 'was' dying. She says she's better now. She says it's this place... the island. But when the camp split up, I was sure that she'd want to go with Locke. Why would she want to leave the island, and risk getting sick again?
Then why do you stay with Jack?
Because it was the right thing to do. Locke... he's a murderer. See, it's all about karma, Jin. Do you know karma?
You make bad choices, bad things happen to you. But you make good choices, and then good—
Hey! Hey, hey, hey! You got one! Yeah. Here, pull it in.
Wow, look at that! You see? Now, that's karma. We must be the good guys, huh?
How long's that gonna go on for, eh? Can't they just fix whatever the bloody hell's causing that?
What, you think somebody's doing that? Somebody's just banging those pipes again and again?
Gentlemen, thanks for your patience. The captain would like to see you now.
I'm a doctor. I don't know where he's going.
Did he go to the island?
You know anywhere else he could land?
What's he going to do there?
I said I'm just a doctor.
He didn't say anything to me.
That woman just jumped over the side of the ship!
Don't just stand there! What's the matter with you people?!
What's wrong with you? Get the rope!
It's over! She's gone! Everybody get back to your posts. That was an order.
I'm Captain Gault. I suppose you two have a few questions.
So what can I do for you?
You boys said you wanted to speak with me.
Let's just start with why a woman jumped over the side of your ship, and you did nothing to stop it.
I didn't jump in, or order my crew to jump in, because I didn't want to lose any more people.
What exactly is going on here?
Some of my crew has been dealing with... what might best be described as a heightened case of cabin fever. I think it's got something to do with the close proximity of the island.
Why don't you turn around, then?
I've tried, but we have a saboteur on board, and he's done one hell of a job on my engines. I've got my crew working around the clock to repair them.
And then you'll take our people home?
Then we move to safer waters... those are my orders.
And I don't suppose you'll tell us who gave you those orders?
Do either of you know what this is?
It's a flight data recorder, otherwise known as a black box.

That's exactly what it is. Now here's the funny thing. This black box comes from Oceanic Flight 815. A salvage vessel recovered it from the bottom of the ocean. It took a considerable amount of Mr. Widmore's resources to procure it. It was found with the wreckage of the plane, along with all 324 dead passengers. That's not the complete story, as you are well aware, Mr. Jarrah, given the fact that you're standing here, breathing... the wreckage was obviously staged. Now, can you imagine what kind of resources and manpower go into pulling off a feat of that magnitude? Faking the recovery of a plane crash? Putting 324 families through a grieving process based on a lie? But what's even more disturbing... where exactly does one come across 324 dead bodies? And that, Mr. Jarrah, Mr. Hume, is just one of the many reasons we want Benjamin Linus.
I'm sorry. I had to stop you any way I could.
It wasn't your place to stop us.
I know you don't trust me, but you need to get off this island. We all do.

More than anything. I don't know if that boat out there is the answer or not, but it's something. I need to go home. So do you. Sun... in about three weeks, you'll be in an almost constant state of nausea. A week after that, you will experience shortness of breath that won't go away. A week after that, you will lose consciousness and slip into a coma. And then, Sun, you will die. And when your heart stops beating... so will the baby's. And that, Sun, is why it is my business, because you are my patient. If you go... you will die. And your baby will never be born.
선화 씨! 제왕절개를 해야할 것 같습니다.
잘 모르는 것 같으신데, 저희가 놓아드린 진통제 때문에 자연분만은 아주 힘들 거 같습니다.
안돼요, 남편이, 내 남편이 올 때까지 안돼...
아직 안 오셨습니다. 더 이상 기다릴 수가 없어요.
자, 선화 씨. 이제부터 힘을 주셔야 합니다. 거의 다 왔습니다. 조금만 더 미세요! 미세요! 할 수 있습니다! 네, 조금만 더 미세요!
So what do you think of the captain?
Yeah, he tells it like it is. Just don't piss him off. You know what I mean? I think you'll like your room. It's on a quiet part of the ship.
That shouldn't still be there... Damn it!
Hey, Johnson. Is that you? Johnson!
Sorry, I gotta go up on deck.
No, you're gonna mop this up!
난 당신이 날 떠난 줄 알았어요. 나한테 설명할 기회를 좀 줘요.
당신이 왜 그랬는지 난 알고 있어. 그리고 내가 어떤 남자였는지도... 잘 알아. 이 섬에 오기 전에... 내가 당신에게 냉정하게 대하고 당신보다는 일을 선택한 나였어. 하여튼... 이 모든 것들이 다 나 때문이야. 그거 잘 알아. 그래서... 내가 당신을... 용서해.
더 이상 그 곳에 가고 싶지 않아요.
줄리엣 말이 맞았어요. 무슨 일이 있어도 우린 이 섬에 떠나가야 해요. 저 사람들은 헬리콥터도 있고 배도 있어요. 우리도 방법을 찾아봐요.
무슨 일이 있어도 당신과 우리 아이를 지켜줄 거야. 맹세할께.
네, 진수씨. 하늘에 맹세코 당신 아이 맞아요. 정말이예요. 자기 너무 사랑해요.
난 당신이 날 떠난 줄 알았어.
나도 사랑해. 나 당신과 절대 헤어지지 않을 거야.
안녕하십니까. 백 자동차사의 회장님이 보내서 온 권진수라고 합니다.
대사님이 오늘 손주를 보셨다고 하셔서 선물을 전해드리러 왔습니다.
네, 대사님. 이 팬더는 대국 중국에서 사업을 시작하겠다는 백 회장님의 뜻이 담겨 있습니다. 부디 오늘 같은 기쁜 날 이 선물을 받아 주시면 감사하겠습니다.
시간이 충분히 있어요. 이제 결혼한 지 두달 밖에 안 됐거든요.
I can't believe you came all this way.
Are you kidding? Is anyone else coming?
Would you like to hold her?
I don't know, I... kinda have two left hands.
Wow... she looks just like Jin.
So... I guess we should, like, go see him.
여보... 여보 말이 맞았어요. 딸이예요. 나 정말 견디기 힘들었어요. 의사 선생님 말로는... 나 계속 당신만 찾았대. 당신이 옆에 있었으면 참 좋았을텐데... 진수 씨, 우리 딸 예쁘죠? 아기 이름은... 당신이 원하는 대로 지연이라고 지었어요. 자기 너무 보고 싶어. 너무 보고 싶어.
